svg.title: Archon — System Architecture
svg.desc: Topology, data flow, and the seven-stage scan pipeline for Archon, the ERC-8004 trustless smart contract auditor on Mantle Mainnet.

g.text: The trustless auditor agent, end to end.
Read-only ingestion · seven-stage analysis pipeline · AI reasoning · verifiable ERC-8004 proof. One VM does ninety percent of the work.
B · SINGLE GOOGLE CLOUD VM — flat cost, ~90% of all compute
SSE stream endpoint — live scan updates to the browser
Zod-validated input · fast handlers · no long work here
Runs the seven-stage pipeline · concurrency 2 · watchdog timeouts
Publishes stage / finding / log events over Redis pub-sub
BullMQ queue · pub-sub · AI response cache
THE SEVEN-STAGE SCAN PIPELINE — LOCKED ORDER

svg.text: user reviews report — then explicitly approves

g.text: D · MANTLE MAINNET — the only place a transaction ever happens
one signature · user-approved · read-only everywhere else
Append-only — every audit posts an entry.
Third parties attest to — or challenge —
A judge re-derives report_hash from the
report and matches it against the on-chain
trust the math, not the claim
· The pipeline is read-only. The only transaction in the entire product is the user-approved proof log.
· One VM carries ~90% of compute — flat cost, no per-invocation billing, no on-demand build farms.
· Every audit becomes a verifiable ERC-8004 Reputation object; challenge UX remains disabled until official Validation is configured.
ARCHON · ERC-8004 trustless auditor agent · Mantle Mainnet · Turing Test Hackathon 2026
